title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, and Ambiguity · Go Build Room
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a bounded Go confirm-window ledger, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a bounded Go confirm-window ledger while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Confirm Channel Contract
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 6046 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then add a subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Confirm Channel Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Confirm Channel Contract, keep Confirm Channel Contract connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.
